modelIdentity.boundary: Desktop Ollama uses the same Gemma 3 1B family but is not proof of WebLLM quantization, WebGPU, or phone runtime behavior.

releaseConclusion: The grounded hybrid is the best tested combination, but real long-meeting usefulness remains below the release bar.
